emails.subject: f.o.m. HPL nom. eff. April 1, 2001
emails.body: Daren, I tried to get KCS to give me the nom earlier but it is just now coming in. The nom on Vance's spreadsheet was 7,129. KCS is reducing the gathering piece to 5,500. Bob Forwarded by Robert Cotten/HOU/ECT on 03/28/2001 12:26 PM Bob Withers <rww@KCSEnergy.com> on 03/28/2001 11:16:01 AM
